title.zh: Requests：包装 urllib3 连接池异常
title.en: Requests: wrap a urllib3 connection-pool exception

summary.zh: 审查一个 Requests adapter PR：作者捕获 urllib3 的 ClosedPoolError，并把它转换成 Requests 的 ConnectionError。
summary.en: Review a Requests adapter PR: the author catches urllib3 ClosedPoolError and converts it to Requests ConnectionError.

reviewTarget.note: The reviewed patch is an AgentCode adapted patch for review training. It is not the upstream maintainer patch unless explicitly stated.

pr.title: Wrap ClosedPoolError as a Requests ConnectionError
pr.author: codegen-agent
body: Some adapter error paths can leak urllib3 ClosedPoolError directly to callers, which breaks the expectation that Requests users catch requests.exceptions types at the public API boundary.
This PR imports ClosedPoolError in adapters.py and maps it to requests.exceptions.ConnectionError next to the existing urllib3-to-Requests exception conversions.
Added a focused regression test for ClosedPoolError so callers now see ConnectionError. Existing Requests tests pass.

background: Requests wraps lower-level urllib3 failures in its own requests.exceptions hierarchy so callers do not depend on urllib3 internals.
HTTPAdapter.send already maps several urllib3 exceptions, including proxy, timeout, SSL, and connection failures.
The review context includes the pre-patch exception mapping excerpt in src-adapters.py.

notes: The PR fixes one observed exception but leaves the broader API-boundary class incomplete. Callers can still see other urllib3 exceptions such as DecodeError or TimeoutError instead of Requests exception types.
A stable exception boundary is a contract, not a one-off mapping for the single failure seen in a test. The review should ask whether the patch covers the reported class of lower-level exceptions.
The new test is too narrow: it proves ClosedPoolError is wrapped but does not cover decode, timeout, or proxy timeout paths that exercise the same public API boundary.

learningGoal: 判断库边界是否完整包装下层依赖异常，而不是只处理一个观测到的异常类型。

terms.description: 库对外暴露的稳定错误类型和行为边界。
把下层依赖异常转换成当前库自己的异常类型。
响应解码阶段可能来自 urllib3 的异常。
连接池或代理超时可能来自 urllib3 的异常。

behaviorChecks.reviewQuestion: PR 覆盖了哪个具体异常？

behaviorChecks.expected: 也不应穿透 urllib3 类型。
behaviorChecks.reviewQuestion: 同类下层异常是否仍泄漏？

behaviorChecks.expected: 应映射到 Requests timeout/connection 异常。
behaviorChecks.reviewQuestion: 异常映射是否覆盖完整边界？
